additional_open_items.note: NOT one of the four authorized ruling candidates; surfaced for a ruling BEFORE component-6 (portfolio-to-ledger -> daily NAV/returns -> Increment-1 metric interfaces) is built.
additional_open_items.question: For the daily net portfolio return series feeding the Increment-1 metric family (Sharpe, DSR, stationary bootstrap), what is the daily MARKING convention for held positions (official opens open-to-open, vs close-to-close)? §4 fixes EXECUTION at official opens and labels close-to-close execution 'diagnostic only', but the daily NAV/return marking cadence for the return SERIES is not pinned in one place.
additional_open_items.recommended_resolution_NONBINDING: Mark held positions daily on the registered execution price series (split-adjusted, non-dividend-adjusted official opens), consistent with V3; or confirm the intended cadence.

authority_note: The v0.3 construction table (§3-§5) is frozen UNCHANGED into the owner-signed v1.0 (70108c11) and its sealed-bound freeze candidate (7b5ee09c). prereg.exposure_limits_frozen + cost_model_frozen_values are the machine-readable MIRRORS of the v0.3 §5 limits; the loader will bind those and cite v0.3 §5 for the algorithm. v0.3 sha 1007db82 == prereg.governing_gate_source.v0.3_gate_table_sha256.
boundary: No sealed data read; no signal/residual/z/volatility computation; no performance. Enumeration only.
confirmed_frozen_no_reopen: constraint order: position cap -> sector caps -> beta limit -> nothing else (PR-11)
removal tie-break: older signal, then permanent identifier (PR-13)
drift repair: oldest position, then permanent identifier (PR-15)
replacement: none; removed capacity remains cash (PR-14)
sector source: PIT classification or a frozen, evidence-bound mapping (PR-24)

conflicts.assessment: NOT a contradiction: the same economic limits (1.5% per-name, 2% ADV) are enforced at two STAGES (construction target + execution safety). Reconciled by the three-state exposure model (PR-22/PR-23, RC-2/RC-4).

exposure_state_model.integrity: A post-execution check recomputes realized per-name/gross/net/sector/beta and refuses (INTEGRITY_STOP or REFUSED replay) if any exceeds a target constraint; it never resizes or substitutes.
exposure_state_model.purpose: Prevent the portfolio layer and execution layer from appearing to disagree when they enforce different STAGES of the same rule.

phase: Increment 3 Phase-0 (census + governance questions ONLY; no loader/selection/normalization/cascade/replay/tests-beyond-census; no data; no performance)
phase0_stop: Owner rules RC-1..RC-4 (+ the additional daily-marking item before component-6). THEN Increment 3 build proceeds: identity-bound loader (binds FROZEN PR-* + prereg mirrors) -> synthetic candidate interface -> deterministic cascade -> frozen exposure controls (three-state) -> A/B/C single code path -> synthetic portfolio-to-ledger replay -> qualification fixtures.

proposed_candidate_schema.fail_closed: missing/duplicate candidate_id; missing/0/neg/nonfinite registered_sigma_resid; missing sector_id/beta when the corresponding constraint applies; non-finite registered_signal_value or exposure input; unknown configuration_id.

fields.beta: float = registered beta-hat_m (missing when beta constraint applies -> fail closed)
fields.configuration_id: A | B | C (selects only Z_entry per PR-20)
fields.eligibility_status: str/enum summarizing §4 eligibility (earnings-clearance, gap filter, corporate-action, liquidity)
fields.registered_inverse_vol_weight: OPTIONAL float, EVIDENCE ONLY; evaluator recomputes 1/registered_sigma_resid and cross-checks
fields.registered_sigma_resid: float > 0, finite = 60-session vol of the registered 5-session residual (upstream frozen signal artifact; NOT computed here; missing/0/neg/nonfinite -> fail closed) [RC-1]
fields.registered_signal_value: float = residual z (used for Z_entry threshold + |z| ordering/tie-breaks; RC-1/OQ-2)
fields.sector_id: str (frozen taxonomy per PR-24; missing when a sector cap applies -> fail closed)

purpose: Map every portfolio-construction rule Increment 3 needs to its exact governing citation (status FROZEN / DERIVED_MECHANIC / OPEN / OUT_OF_SCOPE). Per the 'no reasonable defaults' directive, no economic rule is inferred; OPEN items require owner rulings before construction code.

rules.governing_quote: Gross exposure is a 100%-of-NAV MAXIMUM, not a target; unused capital remains cash; no return credited to cash in the primary result.
rules.implementation_consequence: Loader binds gross_max=1.00*NAV; unused notional -> cash (no redistribution, no cash yield in primary).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Exits first, then entries. One position per symbol; no pyramiding; no re-entry at the same open a symbol exited.
rules.implementation_consequence: Construction processes exits before entries each session; one-position-per-symbol; no-same-open re-entry already enforced in Increment 2 (simulate_sequence).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Candidate sides from §4; raw weight proportional to 1/sigma_resid (60-session 5-day residual vol), normalized within each side.
rules.implementation_consequence: The WEIGHTING RULE is frozen; its INPUT sigma_resid is OPEN (RC-1 / OQ registered_sigma_resid); the inversion + normalization are DERIVED_MECHANIC (PR-04/PR-05).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: raw_inverse_vol_weight = 1 / registered_sigma_resid (Increment-3 arithmetic on a frozen input; NOT residual/vol estimation).
rules.implementation_consequence: Increment 3 computes 1/registered_sigma_resid and cross-checks any candidate-supplied inverse; it may NOT estimate volatility or residuals (OUT_OF_SCOPE PR-25).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Raw weights normalized WITHIN each side (long pool and short pool separately).
rules.implementation_consequence: Increment 3 normalizes provided/derived raw weights within each side (arithmetic over the eligible candidate set; not signal generation).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: New books matched at order time: long gross = short gross = min(feasible long side, feasible short side, 50% of NAV). No forced trade solely to satisfy neutrality.
rules.implementation_consequence: Allocation sizes both sides to the common min; per-side cap 50% NAV; total gross <= 100% NAV. No fill invented to force neutrality.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Neutrality matched AT ORDER TIME (construction), not enforced on realized fills.
rules.implementation_consequence: Neutrality is a construction-target property (see PR-22 three-state model); realized post-clip neutrality is verified, not forced (RC-2).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Max position market value = 1.5% of current portfolio NAV (non-recursive).
rules.implementation_consequence: Per-name target cap 1.5% NAV at construction; SAME number enforced at execution as a safety check (RC-4); applied once, not compounded.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Net dollar exposure per sector <= 5% of gross; gross per sector <= 20% of gross.
rules.implementation_consequence: Loader binds sector_net_max=0.05*gross, sector_gross_max=0.20*gross; requires candidate sector_id (frozen taxonomy, PR-24).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: With signed weights w_i as fractions of NAV and beta_i = each stock's §3 beta-hat_m: |Sum w_i beta_i| / gross_exposure <= 0.10.
rules.implementation_consequence: Portfolio beta = signed weighted sum / gross; requires candidate beta (registered beta-hat_m). Aggregation convention is frozen (no ambiguity).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Constraints applied in registered reduction order: (i) position cap -> (ii) sector caps -> (iii) beta limit -> (iv) nothing else.
rules.implementation_consequence: Cascade evaluates position cap, then sector caps, then beta, then stops. Pre-confirmed by owner; not reopened.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: If constraints are infeasible, remove the candidate with the smallest |z| first and re-apply.
rules.implementation_consequence: Infeasibility repair removes smallest-|z| candidate iteratively. Pre-confirmed.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Tie on smallest |z|: older signal, then permanent identifier.
rules.implementation_consequence: Removal ordering deterministic: |z| asc -> older signal -> permanent id. Pre-confirmed.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Removal of a candidate never renormalizes remaining weights upward - freed capacity always goes to cash. (No substitution of a removed candidate.)
rules.implementation_consequence: Removed capacity -> cash; remaining weights unchanged; no lower-ranked substitution. Pre-confirmed (replacement=none).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: No rebalance while |net dollar exposure| <= 5% of gross. On breach, reduce the larger side only until inside the band, selecting by smallest |entry z| first (tie: oldest position, then permanent identifier); reductions trade at the next open.
rules.implementation_consequence: Drift band 5% of gross; repair reduces larger side by |entry z| asc -> oldest position -> permanent id. Pre-confirmed.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Existing positions are not re-marked to target weights.
rules.implementation_consequence: Held positions keep fixed shares; construction sizes only NEW entries. Pre-confirmed.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Unused capital remains cash; freed/removed/clipped capacity -> cash; no return credited to cash in the primary result.
rules.implementation_consequence: All un-deployed / removed / clipped notional accumulates as cash; primary result credits no cash yield.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Long entry requires z <= -Z_entry AND bottom 10% of the day's long-eligible pool AND earnings-clearance AND no announced merger/split/delisting/major corporate action AND gap filter passes AND liquidity envelope. Short mirrors on the short-eligible pool.
rules.implementation_consequence: Eligibility rules are frozen; the SYNTHETIC candidate carries a caller-provided eligibility_status summarizing them (Increment 3 does not recompute earnings/corporate-action calendars from data).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Percentiles computed within each side; ties broken by |z| then permanent security identifier; selection is bottom/top 10% of side-eligible z-scores.
rules.implementation_consequence: Selection orders eligible candidates by z within side; the |z| ordering also drives PR-12/PR-13 repair. registered_signal_value = z (RC-1 / OQ-2 confirm).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Configurations A/B/C differ ONLY in the entry z-threshold Z_entry = 1.75 / 2.00 / 2.25; all other portfolio, cost, execution, and sample rules identical.
rules.implementation_consequence: One code path; configuration_id in {A,B,C} selects only Z_entry; replay output must prove no other parameter differs.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Exits without a valid official opening price remain pending and execute at the next available official regular-session open; combined with one-position-per-symbol and fixed-shares, the position stays held until it fills.
rules.implementation_consequence: A pending exit keeps its shares/exposure/sector/beta/capital in account state and blocks a same-symbol new entry until it fills (RC-3 confirms the construction-layer treatment). Deferral itself already implemented in Increment 2.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.conflicting_source: prereg cost_model_frozen_values (execution-layer) vs §5 (construction-layer) enforce the SAME limits at different STAGES - not a contradiction; the three-state model reconciles them.
rules.governing_quote: Constraints bind to intended target weights; Increment-2 execution (ADV/NAV clip) may only reduce absolute executed exposure; clipped capacity remains cash and is not redistributed.
rules.implementation_consequence: Replay must record pre-constraint raw target, post-construction intended target, and post-execution realized exposure; a post-execution integrity check (no resize/substitute) verifies realized exposure violates no target constraint - asymmetric long/short clipping can worsen net exposure or normalized beta, so 'clipping is always safe' is NOT assumed (RC-2).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Construction sets intended per-name exposure <= 1.5% NAV; execution enforces the same 1.5% against executable notional as a safety check; not multiplied or compounded.
rules.implementation_consequence: One economic limit, two enforcement points: execution uses min(intended shares, 2% ADV cap, 1.5%-NAV executable cap); any reduction -> cash. RC-4 confirms single application (no sequential double-clip).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Accept only (1) a genuine PIT sector/industry history, or (2) historically effective SIC/NAICS converted through a frozen mapping table whose hash ships in the evidence package.
rules.implementation_consequence: Synthetic candidate carries sector_id directly (caller-provided), consistent with the frozen taxonomy source; Increment 3 does NOT reconstruct PIT-SIC (OUT_OF_SCOPE). Pre-confirmed (PIT or frozen evidence-bound mapping).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: Rolling 60-session OLS residual, five-session sum, and z-normalization define the signal; sigma_resid is the 60-session residual vol.
rules.implementation_consequence: Increment 3 is NOT authorized to compute residuals, z-scores, or volatility - these arrive as registered candidate fields (registered_signal_value, registered_sigma_resid). Enforced as a not-authorized boundary.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: §5a volatility overlay is secondary reporting only; primary result = unscaled (<= 1.0x gross).
rules.implementation_consequence: Increment 3 PRIMARY replay excludes the overlay; not implemented this increment.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

rules.governing_quote: 2% trailing-ADV participation clip and 1.5% NAV new-entry cap; clip never delays; unfilled notional remains cash.
rules.implementation_consequence: Already implemented + qualified in Increment 2; Increment 3 reuses it unchanged (must not duplicate inconsistently - see RC-4).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11); prereg mirrors change only via a versioned preregistration correction record.

ruling_candidates.evidence: PR-03 requires weight ∝ 1/sigma_resid (§5.2, v0.3 1007db82); the authorized candidate schema omits any sizing input; PR-25 makes residual/vol computation OUT_OF_SCOPE.
proposed_disposition: The synthetic candidate MUST carry registered_sigma_resid = the 60-session volatility of the registered five-session residual, provided by the upstream frozen signal artifact; strictly positive, finite, and NOT computed by Increment 3.
Increment 3 may compute ONLY raw_inverse_vol_weight = 1 / registered_sigma_resid and normalize within side.
Increment 3 may NOT calculate residuals or estimate volatility.
The candidate MAY also include a derived inverse value as evidence; the evaluator recomputes 1/registered_sigma_resid and cross-checks it.
A missing, zero, negative, or non-finite registered_sigma_resid FAILS CLOSED.
ruling_candidates.title: Position-sizing interface (registered_sigma_resid)

ruling_candidates.evidence: §5 constraints are construction-target properties; Increment-2 ADV/NAV clip reduces executed size to cash. Asymmetric long/short clipping can worsen net exposure or normalized beta even though per-symbol clipping reduces absolute exposure.
proposed_disposition: Portfolio constraints bind to intended TARGET weights before execution.
Increment-2 clipping may only reduce the ABSOLUTE executed exposure; clipped capacity remains cash and is not redistributed.
After execution, realized exposure MUST be recomputed and verified not to exceed any target constraint.
Do NOT assume clipping is always safe: the replay records BOTH target and executed exposures and runs a post-execution integrity check.
The post-execution check MUST NOT resize or substitute orders; a violation produces an INTEGRITY_STOP or an explicit REFUSED replay outcome.
ruling_candidates.title: Target versus executed exposure

ruling_candidates.evidence: §4 halts (pending exit executes next available open) + §5.1 one-position-per-symbol + §5.5 fixed shares.
proposed_disposition: A deferred exit remains an OPEN held position.
Its shares, exposure, sector usage, beta contribution, and capital remain part of account state until the exit actually fills.
The symbol is INELIGIBLE for a new position while the exit is pending.
ruling_candidates.title: Pending exits

ruling_candidates.evidence: §5 position cap 1.5% NAV (construction) and prereg cost_model new_entry_cap_fraction_of_nav 0.015 (execution) are the SAME number.
proposed_disposition: Construction layer sets intended per-name exposure at no more than 1.5% of NAV.
Execution layer enforces the same 1.5% limit against executable notional as a safety check.
The limits are NOT multiplied or compounded.
Execution uses min(intended shares, 2% ADV cap, 1.5%-NAV executable cap); any reduction remains cash.
One economic limit with two enforcement points, not two sequential 1.5% reductions.
ruling_candidates.title: The 1.5% cap at two layers

status_legend.DERIVED_MECHANIC: a mechanical computation Increment 3 performs on frozen inputs (arithmetic; not signal/residual/vol generation).
status_legend.FROZEN: explicit in the governing text; loader binds it and cites it.
status_legend.OPEN: requires an owner ruling before construction code (see ruling_candidates / additional_open_items).
status_legend.OUT_OF_SCOPE: explicitly not authorized in Increment 3 (or secondary-only); not implemented.
